{'cypher': 'MATCH (target {eDISK_ID:$target_id})\n'
           '    MATCH (neighbor:DSI)-[r]-(target)\n'
           '    WITH target, neighbor, r\n'
           '    WITH\n'
           '        target,\n'
           '        neighbor,\n'
           '        collect({\n'
           '            edge_type: type(r),\n'
           "            direction: CASE WHEN startNode(r)=target THEN 'outbound' ELSE 'inbound' "
           'END,\n'
           '            properties: properties(r)\n'
           '        }) AS rels,\n'
           '        count(r) AS rel_count,\n'
           '        max(coalesce(r.Score, r.score, r.Confidence, r.confidence, r.Weight, r.weight, '
           '0.0)) AS best_score,\n'
           '        coalesce(neighbor.Name, neighbor.name, neighbor.Symbol, neighbor.Label, '
           'neighbor.eDISK_ID, neighbor.id, neighbor.ID) AS neighbor_name\n'
           '    RETURN {\n'
           '        id: coalesce(neighbor.eDISK_ID, neighbor.id, neighbor.ID),\n'
           '        name: neighbor_name,\n'
           '        labels: labels(neighbor)\n'
           '    } AS neighbor,\n'
           '    rels AS relations,\n'
           '    rel_count AS relation_count,\n'
           '    best_score AS best_score,\n'
           '    neighbor_name AS neighbor_name\n'
           '    ORDER BY relation_count DESC, best_score DESC, neighbor_name\n'
           '    LIMIT $limit',
 'neighbor_label': 'DSI',
 'params': {'limit': 5, 'target_id': 'DSI000855'}}
